✦ Welcome ✦

Hey there, it's Lautaro Soza. I built this interactive map to deliver monthly updates and help students track their state, stay connected, and stay engaged with the North American Programs network.

Give it a try, go click Monthly Updates in the top-right corner to see what's happening this month.

"The victory at battle is not determined by the amount of soldiers, but from the forces that come from heaven." — Javier Milei

✦ North American Programs News ✦
DISPATCH 1 OF 5  ·  MARCH 2026
A Farewell to the Director

Florian Windberger Steps Down as Program Director

After several years of dedicated service at the helm of North American Programs, Florian Windberger will be departing from his role as Program Director and from Students For Liberty.

Under his leadership, the North America team grew its reach across both the United States and Canada, deepening the pipeline of liberty-minded student leaders across the continent. His strategic direction and personal investment in every coordinator left a lasting mark on the program.

Florian has expressed warm wishes for the team and the mission ahead. We thank him sincerely for his years of service and wish him every success in his next chapter.

Onward to New Horizons

Connor Sutton Pursues Master's in the United Kingdom

Connor Sutton, North American Programs Manager, will be transitioning out of his role to pursue a Master's degree in the United Kingdom, moving on as a proud SFL Alumni.

Connor will remain with the team until the middle of March. All House Leaders are urged to reach out to him directly to confirm transition steps, outstanding deliverables, and continuity of their programs before his departure.

Failure to connect before his last day may result in delays. Do not wait — contact Connor now.

Speaker Series

Houses to Careers — Nikki Muggli

Nikki Muggli is an SFL alumni who worked across multiple regions globally, including helping build and expand SFL programs on limited budgets. She is currently pursuing her J.D. while launching her own startups.

Whether you are interested in growing the movement, pursuing law school, or entrepreneurship — she will be an invaluable connection to make. Join us for an exclusive conversation.

📅 Thursday, March 12th · 7:00 PM ET

Why Liberty Retreat — Sofia, Bulgaria

Asher Boekestein and Joshua McHoes traveled to Sofia to attend the Why Liberty Retreat — an intensive on public speaking, debate, and liberty advocacy alongside students from across the global SFL network.

The retreat runs annually for coordinators looking to sharpen their stage presence and connect with the broader liberty movement. Both attendees represented North America well.

Unconfirmed reports suggest neither touched a single Rakija. The local delegation remains skeptical. 🥃

Opportunity Bulletin

AIER — Last Chance: Summer 2026 Internships

The American Institute for Economic Research is accepting applications for its Summer 2026 Research Internship and Graduate Fellowship programs. Both are 10 weeks, designed for students advancing free enterprise, economic liberty, and sound money.

⚠️ Application deadline: March 6, 2026

Summer Seminars also available: Classical Liberalism & The American Founding (Charleston, SC · May 26–31) and Classical Liberalism and Public Policy (Morgantown, WV · June 7–13).

🇲🇽 Top Leaders Retreat

Top Leaders Retreat — Mexico City!

The most accomplished leaders across North America will converge in Mexico City for an exclusive multi-day retreat focused on strategy, networking, and advancing liberty.

📅 April 29th – May 3rd, 2026

This is your reward for exceptional performance during the academic year. The final list of selected students will be distributed via email — watch your inbox for your invitation.

¡La libertad no se detiene en la frontera!

🌴 Staff Retreat — Miami, Florida

Staff Retreat — Miami, Florida

An internal Staff Retreat is coming to Miami, Florida — bringing together Global Leadership, the full North American Programs team, and every coordinator from the Sunshine State.

GLOBAL & NA STAFF
Dr. Wolf von Laer (CEO) · André Freo (Director of International Programs) · Garreth Conner · Marcos Batista · Lautaro Soza Torrijos

FLORIDA — STATE COORDINATOR
Pedro Kreutz

FLORIDA — LOCAL COORDINATORS
Nicolas Gonzalez · Luke Alley · Marcela Mandelli · Alejandro Barrios · Luísa Almeida Quintella · Rafaela Mandelli Seibert · Edwin Guillen · Drew Graham

Schedule and logistics to be shared internally closer to the date. 🌊

🏛️ LibertyCon Madrid — Golden Tickets

LibertyCon Madrid — Check Your Inbox

LibertyCon Madrid is confirmed — and the announcement of Golden Ticket recipients has been made. If you were selected, an email with your full invitation and logistics has been sent to your inbox.

LibertyCon is SFL's flagship annual conference, uniting student leaders, alumni, speakers, and partners from across the globe. This year's edition in Madrid, Spain will be one of the most international gatherings in the event's history.

🎫 Golden Ticket holders: Review your invitation email for travel details, accommodation, and your personalized agenda. RSVP deadlines are firm — do not delay.

¡La libertad nos une — nos vemos en Madrid! 🇪🇸

🔥 Social Media on Fire! — sfliberty.us

Social Media on Fire!

sfliberty.us just had their best month of the fiscal year with a staggering 5.7 million views! 🚀

A huge congratulations to Marcella Mandelli, Asher Boestein, and Dibbo Das for driving this incredible milestone.

The message of liberty is spreading — one scroll at a time. 🇺🇸

🚫 Applications Closed — Summer Cohort 2025

Applications Closed — Summer Cohort

The Summer Cohort application window is officially closed. The borders are shut — no more freedom fighters getting through! 🚧🗽

And what a year it was: Students For Liberty just wrapped its best recruitment year ever, with more than 700 applications submitted for the Summer Cohort alone.

A massive thank you to everyone involved in making this happen — the outreach, the follow-ups, the late nights. This is what building a movement looks like. 🌎

The next generation of liberty leaders is incoming. 🎓

The Full Picture — Continental Operations

North America: The Road Ahead

As we close this Fiscal Year, we take a moment to look at the full picture of SFL North America — a network of liberty-minded students stretching from British Columbia to Florida, from Alberta to Québec.

With new coordinators joining, applicants advancing through the pipeline, and major events on the horizon, the movement is growing in every corner of the continent.

This map represents more than geography — it represents every conversation, event, and campus action pushing liberty forward, one territory at a time.

Stay engaged. Stay active. The continent is watching.
